name: avocado-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Vue frontend and Nest backend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm -C apps/api start:dev" "pnpm -C apps/frontend dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm -C apps/api start" "pnpm -C apps/frontend dev"
